name: Veazy Wear & Tear Set
summary: Veazy Wear & Tear Set — a cleaning accessory for keeping your device clean for purer vapour.
description: The Veazy Wear & Tear Set provides all the essential replacement parts to keep the Veazy performing at its best. Designed by Storz & Bickel specifically for the Veazy Vaporiser, this kit ensures long-lasting reliability, fresh airflow, and consistently smooth vapour. A clean device gives cleaner vapour and a more reliable dose.
